metaDescription: Compare Meta Ads, Google Ads, and acquisition strategies for training centers.

meta-ads-vs-google-ads.title: Meta Ads vs Google Ads for training centers
meta-ads-vs-google-ads.description: Detailed comparison: cost, intent, time to results, and use cases.
meta-ads-vs-google-ads.verdict: Combine both: Meta for volume and awareness, Google for high-intent conversion.

faqs.question: Should I choose only one channel?
faqs.answer: No, the Meta + Google synergy is the most effective strategy for most centers.

faqs.question: Which to prioritize with a small budget?
faqs.answer: Google if your training is searched for; Meta if you need to create demand.
